prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Audit the access control and row-level security implementation in ClickHouse/ClickHouse. Find all C++ source and header files under src/Access/ that implement: the AccessControl manager and its user/role resolution, the RowPolicy filter generation and attachment to queries, the ContextAccess class that checks permissions per query, the IAccessStorage interface hierarchy (UsersConfigAccessStorage, DiskAccessStorage, ReplicatedAccessStorage), and the GRANT/REVOKE statement handlers. Report each file path and key class.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the clickhouse-analytics fixture.
